title: Ex-Calgary councillor directed use of personal phone over freedom of information concerns: docs
description: While investigating allegations of corruption at Calgary city hall, police say they uncovered text messages sent by former councillor Sean Chu to a man now accused of offering money for council votes in which Chu said to “keep conversations to his personal phone” because his work phone was “subject to Freedom of Information” disclosure.
text: While investigating allegations of corruption at Calgary city hall, police say they uncovered text messages sent by former. Councillor Sean Chu to a man now accused of offering money for council votes in which Chu said. To “keep conversations to his personal phone” because his work phone was “subject to Freedom of Information” disclosure. The revelation comes from an affidavit sworn by Det. Matt White, who is leading the investigation, which was launched last summer following a council vote on July 16. Police have executed several search warrants in connection with the investigation and seized the cellphones and. Other electronic devices of a number of people. Calgary Police Service lawyer Doug Taylor filed an application asking Justice Allan Fradsham to allow investigators to keep. The cellphones for an additional nine months.
thai_text: ข่าวนี้จาก CBC News อยู่ในหมวดข่าวแคนาดา หัวข้อคือ “Ex-Calgary councillor directed use of personal phone over freedom of information concerns: docs”. ใจความหลักคือ While investigating allegations of corruption at Calgary city hall, police say they uncovered text messages sent by former. Councillor Sean Chu to a man now accused of offering money for council votes in which Chu said. To “keep conversations to his personal phone” because his work phone was “subject to Freedom of Information” disclosure. The revelation comes from an affidavit sworn by Det. สรุปง่าย ๆ คือข่าวนี้เล่าว่าเกิดอะไรขึ้น ใครเกี่ยวข้อง และทำไมเรื่องนี้จึงควรติดตามต่อ. คำสำคัญที่ควรรู้: accused = คำว่า accused / additional = คำว่า additional / affidavit = คำว่า affidavit / allan = คำว่า allan / allegations = คำว่า allegations.
